subject: Cannot log in - locked out before big presentation
message: I've been trying to log in for the last 30 minutes and keep getting 'invalid credentials' even after resetting my password twice. I have a client demo in an hour and need access urgently. This is really frustrating, please help immediately.

conversation_thread.message: Still locked out, tried the reset link twice
Anyone there? This is time sensitive

product_usage_summary: New account, logged in daily since signup, no prior login issues on record
